calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Granting Additional Powers To The Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-28-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES- ATTY. DEBBIE L. KINNEY APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;

THE COURT QUESTIONED MS. KINNEY REGARDING THE CONSENT OF THE TRUCKEE TAHOE COMMUNITY FOUNDATION SINCE THE PETITION STATES IN PARAGRAPH 6, "ALL THE BENEFICIARIES WILL FILE A CONSENT." THE COURT ALSO RAISED THE ISSUE DIRECTING THE SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE AT THE TIME OF APPOINTMENT TO GIVE NOTICE OF REMOVAL OF THE TRUST FROM COURT JURISDICTION. NO FORMAL NOTICE IS REQUIRED SINCE THE CORPORATE TRUSTEE CAN REMOVE IT FROM COURT JURISDICTION. THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION FOR MS. KINNEY TO SUBMIT CONSENT FROM THE TRUCKEE COMMUNITY FOUNDATION AND IF NOT, WILL BE PUT BACK ON THE COURT'S CALENDAR IN 2 WEEKS.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Clerk: Cynthia Herbert. Reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto, CSR #5229 Bailiff: Deputy Lee.

Petition For Order Granting Additional Powers To The Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-21-2007 Continued To Dec-24-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Oct-09-2007 Granted Per Written Order
